description: VERIFIED LIVE: X (Twitter) via content-script DOM extraction. X's API is paid/locked and X renders NOTHING when logged out — but logged in, it renders tweets in stable [data-testid] markup, so these tools read them straight from the DOM of your open, logged-in X tab. Navigate the tab to your home timeline, a profile, a list, or a search, then call the matching tool. Tested live by Claude Code on the home timeline: 12 tweets with author, text, timestamp, permalink and reply/repost/like counts extracted correctly. Requires you to be logged into X in the browser.

tools.name: x_timeline
tools.description: Tweets on the current X TIMELINE (your /home feed, a user profile like /elonmusk, or a list). Navigate the tab there and let it load first. Returns author (name + @handle + date), tweet text, ISO timestamp, permalink and reply/repost/like counts. Scroll to load more. VERIFIED.

tools.name: x_search_results
tools.description: Tweets on the current X SEARCH page (navigate the tab to /search?q=<query>&f=live for latest, or &f=top for top). Same fields as the timeline: author, text, timestamp, permalink, reply/repost/like counts.
